cover_letter: 
extra_context:
jobText: BlackRock Financial Management, Inc. Associate, UX/UI Designer located at 50 Hudson Yards, New York, NY. Duties include contributing to and evolving a unified design system, conducting audits of existing components, identifying areas of evolution, managing timelines, presenting design solutions to cross-functional partners, delivering high-fidelity wireframes, interactive prototypes and detailed visual design, documenting specifications and standards for engineering, leading visual QA, validating design ideas via user testing, and using data to drive solutions. Qualifications include a Bachelor's degree and two years of experience, including data-heavy digital designs, end-to-end ownership of UI design projects, Sketch InVision and Figma, visual design including typography iconography color theory layout and composition, one year in design systems and pattern libraries, and six months of CSS and HTML.
